payload.label: cabinet
payload.short_description: dark brown wooden cabinet door edge
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed rectangular center panel and narrow surrounding frame; matte stained finish with slight scuffing near the bottom edge and a thin gap visible at the base — appears photographed close-up, approximately 0.5 meters from the camera.
